qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of the annual account renewal process?
qa_pairs.answer: The annual account renewal process, which typically occurs in the spring, is critical for deactivating accounts that are no longer needed and for collecting information required by funding agencies and partners for reporting purposes.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if a Principal Investigator's (PI) CCDB account expires?
qa_pairs.answer: If a Principal Investigator (PI) allows their CCDB account to expire, their account, as well as the accounts of all users they sponsor, will also be deactivated.

qa_pairs.question: How can a user reactivate an expired CCDB account?
qa_pairs.answer: Accounts can be reactivated at any time by logging into CCDB (https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/) and completing the account renewal form.
